profile.name: Nabilah Argyanti
profile.bio: As an Informatics Engineering graduate, I have a strong professional interest in developing software systems that deliver tangible impacts. I specialize in designing backend architectures, mapping complex business processes, and translating abstract user requirements into well-structured applications, primarily utilizing Laravel and Vue.js. Whether developing Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) modules or public service portals, my primary objective is to analyze human behavioral patterns to build technology that is both highly functional and genuinely beneficial for end-users.

education.thesis: Thesis: Recipes Recommendation System Based on Ingredients Availability and User Preferences

technical_skills.description: I specialize in translating complex business logic into efficient and scalable web applications. Furthermore, I am highly capable of structuring disorganized data interactions into streamlined workflows, thereby ensuring that my developed systems effectively resolve practical operational bottlenecks.

I possess a solid capability in processing and analyzing data using fundamental data science techniques. This enables me to extract meaningful insights, model human decision-making processes, and support the implementation of robust data-driven solutions.

work_experience.title: IT Staff at PT Semangat Bersama Entrepreneurship
jobdesk: Translated intricate agricultural workflows into structured ERP modules, effectively bridging the gap between abstract user requirements and technical implementations.
Architected a comprehensive Laravel-based system to digitalize complex seed production cycles, which accurately manages multi-stage inventory transitions.
Streamlined manual data entry processes, thereby minimizing human error and ensuring optimal system availability for operational staff.

work_experience.title: Programmer at UPA TIK Politeknik Negeri Malang
jobdesk: Standardized internal development workflows by engineering a Laravel starter kit, which significantly reduced the setup time required for customized institutional systems.
Digitalized the public information access (PPID) portal to mitigate administrative bottlenecks and promote institutional transparency.
Revamped the institutional website's profile structure to enhance the information architecture and overall user navigation experience.

work_experience.title: Backend Developer at PT Adma Digital Solusi
jobdesk: Engineered a logic-driven recommendation engine utilizing Django to alleviate user decision fatigue by algorithmically matching available ingredients to viable recipes.
Automated the collection of raw data for food ingredients through the implementation of custom Python web scraping scripts.

work_experience.title: Web Developer at Awesome Language Stability
jobdesk: Designed and developed a comprehensive TOEFL prediction platform using the CodeIgniter framework to provide users with immediate and accurate scoring.
Collaborated extensively with the project team to integrate essential services, thereby ensuring a highly reliable and seamless testing experience.

projects.description: An end-to-end ERP module designed to digitalize complex agricultural workflows, systematically streamlining the tracking of seed production stages from raw harvest to finished goods.

projects.title: PPID Politeknik Negeri Malang
projects.description: A transparent public information website that offers accessible and comprehensive data regarding institutional activities, official documents, and administrative procedures.

projects.description: An integrated e-learning platform that delivers a comprehensive educational experience for students and educators, facilitating online courses, interactive quizzes, and assignment management.

projects.description: A digitalized order management and financial tracking system for an orphanage's catering enterprise, effectively replacing disorganized manual ledgers with a structured digital platform.
